zh.Saint George's, Trotton, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可特洛頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG於1351年出生時，他的父親Sir John de Camoys32歲，母親Elizabeth le Latimer26歲。他於大約1380年與Elizabeth Louches在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1380年登記服兵役。他去世於1421年3月28日在英國素可特洛頓享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可特洛頓。

zh-hans.Saint George's, Trotton, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可特洛頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG于1351年出生时，他的父亲Sir John de Camoys32岁，母亲Elizabeth le Latimer26岁。他于大约1380年与Elizabeth Louches在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1380年登记服兵役。他去世于1421年3月28日在英国素可特洛頓享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可特洛頓。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG was born in 1351, his father, Sir John de Camoys, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth le Latimer, was 26. He married Elizabeth Louches about 1380, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1380. He died on 28 March 1421, in Trotton, Sussex, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Trotton, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG est né en 1351, son père, Sir John de Camoys, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth le Latimer, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Louches environ 1380, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1380. Il est décédé le 28 mars 1421, à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG 1351 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Camoys 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth le Latimer 26. Er hat um 1380 in England Elizabeth Louches geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1380 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 28. März 1421 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Trotton, Sussex, England und wurde in Trotton, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG è nato il nel 1351, il suo padre, Sir John de Camoys, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth le Latimer, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Louches circa 1380, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1380. Morì il 28 marzo 1421, nel Trotton, Sussex, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Trotton, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KGが1351年に生まれた時，父Sir John de Camoysは32歳，母Elizabeth le Latimerは26歳であった。約1380年にイギリスでElizabeth Louchesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1380年に兵役登録をした。彼は1421年3月28日にイギリススセックストロットオンで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックストロットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG(이)가 1351년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Camoys(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth le Latimer(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1380년 영국에서 Elizabeth Louches(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1380년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1421년 3월 28일 영국 수세스 트로턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 트로턴에 묻혔다.

pt.from 20 August 1383 to 26 February 1421: de 20 de agosto de 1383 a 26 de fevereiro de 1421
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG nasceu em 1351, seu pai, Sir John de Camoys, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth le Latimer, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Louches aproximadamente 1380, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1380. Ele faleceu em 28 de março de 1421, em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG родился в 1351 г., его отцу по имени Sir John de Camoys было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth le Latimer, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Louches около 1380 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1380 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 28 марта 1421 г. в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG nació en 1351, su papá, Sir John de Camoys, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth le Latimer, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Louches aproximadamente 1380, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1380. Murió el 28 de marzo de 1421, en Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
